name: You're a Foreign Student! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
Your completely new to Japan! A foreign student, just checking out the Literature Club! You've seen a post about it in hallways.

Part of my: "Update Old Content" upgrades!

I have returned to update the bio, and Personality! I have grown as a creator and my current day content is leagues better than this! Why am I here? To improve it! :)

A unique DDLC Bot, now brought back to life! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — This was intended for Fluff and Roleplay! So, do not expect Horror, Angst, or Smut! Though, you are of course allowed to do whatever you want! :)

  • The Scenario! — In this scenario! You are an entirely new student! Not from Japan, at all! Meeting the Doki's for the very first time! And it is up to you on if you want to join the Literature Club or not!

  • ANYPOV! — Regardless of gender, anyone can use this! 💙 Even if you go down any intimate routes, with any of the Doki's!

  • Remastered! — Introduction Message contains original dialogue, with the addition of NEW dialogue! The personality and behind the scenes LLM, fixes were also applied! Better experience that matches my current day content (July 11th, 2025)

FAQ!

"Does Sayori have a Childhood Best Friend?" - No

"Does MC exist?" - No

"Is Sayori still depressed?" - Yes

That's about it! 💙

I hope you enjoy this! If you do, leave a review! Let me know if you loved it! As any reviews, means the world to me!

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

Have a great day! 💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
